items.briefing:
Australian small businesses are increasingly worried about AI-powered cyberattacks, according to new research from WatchGuard. This concern is well-founded, as cybercriminals are using AI to make phishing and other attacks faster and harder to spot. Separately, GitHub is investigating a possible security breach — if you use GitHub for any work projects, keep an eye on official updates and consider reviewing your account security settings.

**Practical tip:** Enable two-factor authentication on any developer or collaboration tools your organisation uses, including GitHub, to reduce your exposure if a breach is confirmed.

featured.title: Chief AI Officers: The next test of Australia's digital government leadership
featured.quote: AI governance gaps in Australian public services pose significant security and accountability risks.
